ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "num_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status of the customer */,
  "credit_score" TEXT /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_credit_score FOREIGN KEY ("credit_score") REFERENCES credit_scores ("credit_score_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., High School Diploma, Bachelor's Degree) */,
  "education_category" TEXT /* Category of the education level (e.g., high school, undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score level */,
  "credit_score_level" TEXT /* Name of the credit score level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "credit_score_range" TEXT /* Range of the credit score (e.g., 300-500 for Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, in-person meeting) */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the interaction (e.g., phone, email, online chat) */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., successful, unsuccessful, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_financial_info" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Current account balance */,
  "transaction_history" TEXT /* Transaction history */,
  "credit_card_info" TEXT /* Credit card information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_marketing_preferences" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred marketing channel */,
  "topics_of_interest" TEXT /* Topics of interest for marketing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
